non_goals: No full OS authority export in Stage 6P.
synthesis: Adopt a small durable checkpoint model rather than a full orchestration engine in this stage.
Use thread_id as durable resume cursor, checkpoint_id as immutable event id, parent_checkpoint_id for hash-chain continuity.
Treat INTERRUPTED checkpoints as the only resumable state; resume payloads produce new RESUMED checkpoints instead of mutating old checkpoints.
Fail closed on missing checkpoints, thread mismatch, schema mismatch, non-JSON payloads, or chat-only resume claims.
